productDisplayName: Nike Men's Tiempo Natural Maroon Shoe
description: Lightweight and durable, the nike Tiempo Natural III FG men's Soccer Cleats are designed for high performance and low environmental impact. Get ready to score with these stylish shoes that give superior traction and ball feel. Upper Synthetic leather upper for superior ball feel Stitch detailing on the toe box area for better reinforcement Lace-ups for snug Fit Flip over tongue with logo Cushioned collar for comfort fit Textile lining for comfort Heel cup for protection and support Appliqued swoosh logo on the side Midsole High-density EVA sockliner for cushioning Outsole Firm-ground (FG) cleats for use on short-grass fields that may be slightly wet, but rarely muddy Outsole designed for maximum traction Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
